title: Parallax Claims Index
description: COMPILED per-repo index of CLAIMS offered into the cross-team exchange (corroboration or divergence subjects), from any source doc type. Generated from `claims:` marks in the source docs into a recent sliding window (∪ claims a live divergence references); not hand-maintained, so it can't go stale; entries age to archived once settled. The convergence-STATE surface: each claim carries evidence_tier (how grounded) + convergence_tag (how it converged cross-team) + status; index-diff reports the state delta. Cross-team diffability emerges as terminology converges through exchange (interface-layer; substance-independence is recorded in convergence_tag). Schema v1.1.

file.description: Aging tier (mirrors divergences). recent = the hot working set (read-reduction + active convergence checks); archived = the retained durable convergence/validation ledger. Default recent — the diff hot path is recent; corroboration verdicts persist in archived rather than being discarded.

evidence_ref.description: Pointer to evidence — a compact, repo-stable id in the consumer's own naming convention (a short doc-id resolvable within the repo), an exercise_step, or a runner. Prefer a compact id over a full path: the index exists to shrink the read surface. Required for measured and inferred tiers (F5).

evidence_tier.description: Shared evidence scale (distinct from warrant authority axis). measured = reproducible measurement. inferred = derived from measurement. conjectural = hypothesis, not yet grounded.

status.description: open = claim active. corroborated = ≥2 independent measurements agree. retired = claim withdrawn. superseded = replaced by a newer claim (see superseded_by).

convergence_tag.description: Cross-team convergence axis (RESTORED from the brainstorm; orthogonal to evidence_tier). independent = both teams reached it without reading each other AND each cites a forcing measurement (counts toward the two-domain bar). propagated = adopted the other's framing (implementation corroboration). modal = explained by a shared prior/trigger/artifact (~zero credit). n/a = no cross-team interaction yet. Default n/a. Single-claim consistency is schema-checked below; the cross-team checks (shared parents, timing, user-trigger) are the convergence_audit's (the rung 0/2/4 detectors).

superseded_by.description: If status is superseded, the id of the claim that replaces this one (F6).
